## Type of change

- [ ] Add / update a source (`data/sources.json`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] `data/sources.json` is valid JSON (if modified)
- [ ] No API keys or secrets committed
- [ ] PR title follows `type: description` format (e.g. `feat: add Cohere blog feed`)
